name: Radroach Races
author: @Theeohn
description: A version of the internet famous

game now for your Pip-boy. Start the game up, 5 seconds to place your bets and they're off! Using logic similar to the DVD bouncing logo to race to the mutfruit at the end, who will win? 10 seperate tracks, 5 shapes for your roaches. Endless hours of fun watching, betting, and forming your own headcanons!
